tasks.title: Domain: validateAlias guard (charset, length, reserved names)
tasks.dod: validateAlias(raw) returns the alias verbatim or throws AliasError with reason 'invalid alias' | 'reserved alias'; charset ^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{3,32}$; reserved names compared case-insensitively; pure, no db

tasks.title: Domain: createLink claim branch — alias becomes the code, 409 on collision
tasks.dod: createLink(db, url, { alias }) validates the alias, refuses a taken one with AliasError reason 'alias taken' and writes nothing, otherwise inserts with code = alias; without an alias the generate-and-retry branch and URL dedup are unchanged

tasks.title: App: map alias outcomes to 201 / 400 / 409
tasks.dod: POST /api/shorten reads an optional alias and maps AliasError to 400 (invalid/reserved) or 409 (taken); a created aliased link follows, lists and reports stats exactly like a generated one; existing tests stay green

tasks.title: Frontend: optional alias input beside the URL field
tasks.dod: an optional alias input is sent only when non-empty (the key is omitted, never sent as an empty string); the server's error string is rendered inline; no alias rule is duplicated in the browser; proven by tests/e2e/alias.spec.js

tasks.title: Tests: unit + integration for AC-01..07
tasks.dod: npm run test:fast green; boundaries 3/32 asserted from both sides, HEALTHZ refused in upper case, a taken alias leaves the existing row byte-identical, and an alias bypasses URL dedup
